en.extract:
The Madagascar cuckooshrike (Ceblepyris cinereus), also known as the ashy cuckooshrike, is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. The Comoros cuckooshrike (Ceblepyris cucullatus) is sometimes considered a distinct species.
It is found in Madagascar, and Mayotte.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''Madagascar cuckooshrike''' ('''''Ceblepyris cinereus'''''), also known as the '''ashy cuckooshrike''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]]. The [[Comoros cuckooshrike]] (''Ceblepyris cucullatus'') is sometimes considered a distinct species.

It is found in [[Madagascar]], and [[Mayotte]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical dry forest]] and [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].

zh.extract:
马岛鹃鵙（学名：Coracina cinerea）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种。绝大多数学者将科摩罗鹃鵙（C. cucullata）视为马岛鹃鵙的亚种。
马岛鹃鵙分布于科摩罗、马达加斯加和马约特岛。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的干燥森林以及亚热带或热带湿润低地森林。


参考文献
BirdLife International. Coracina cinerea. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2009.   [2010-10-20] （英语）.
